author: Kendra Barnett
title: AppLovin’s CEO Is No Longer Board Chair and Two Top Execs Are Stepping Down
description: Public adtech company AppLovin is undergoing a substantive power shift with a slate of changes to its C-suite and board of directors.
content: Mobile adtech giant AppLovin is shaking up its upper ranks with a new chair of the board and the impending departures of both its chief technologist and its chief legal officer.Adam Foroughi, AppLovi… [+409 chars]
